content:
The user wants me to extract the content of the image, which appears to be a technical datasheet page.

**1. Header Information:**
- **Logo:** YAGEO
- **Product Specification:** 6/10
- **Chip Resistor Surface Mount**
- **Series:** RC 0805 (Pb Free)

**2. Graph 1:**
- **Title/Label:** MBD588
- **Y-axis:** $\hat{P}_{max}$ (W) - Logarithmic scale from $10^{-1}$ to $10^3$
- **X-axis:** $t_i$ (s) - Logarithmic scale from $10^{-6}$ to $1$
- **Curves:**
    - "single pulse"
    - "$t_p/t_i = 1000$"
- **Caption:** Fig. 7 Pulse on a regular basis for type: RC0805; maximum permissible peak pulse power as a function of pulse duration for single pulse and repetitive pulse $t_p/t_i = 1000$

**3. Graph 2:**
- **Title/Label:** MLB722
- **Y-axis:** $\hat{V}_{max}$ (V) - Linear scale from 0 to 600
- **X-axis:** $t_i$ (s) - Logarithmic scale from $10^{-6}$ to $1$
- **Curve:** A single curve showing a drop in voltage as time increases.
- **Caption:** Fig. 8 Pulse on a regular basis for type: RC0805; maximum permissible peak pulse voltage as a function of pulse duration

**4. Footer Information:**
- **Icons:** Three circular icons (likely representing RoHS compliance, etc.)
- **Date/Version:** Sep 03, 2004 V.2
- **Website:** www.yageo.com

I will structure the output as a JSON object containing these elements.
```json
[{"bbox": [83, 44, 173, 63], "category": "header", "text": "YAGEO"}, {"bbox": [782, 53, 881, 63], "category": "header", "text": "Product specification"}, {"bbox": [886, 53, 904, 75], "category": "header", "text": "6\n10"}, {"bbox": [186, 68, 638, 85], "category": "header", "text": "Chip Resistor Surface Mount | RC | SERIES | 0805 (Pb Free)"}, {"bbox": [132, 174, 854, 461], "category": "figure", "text": ""}, {"bbox": [108, 483, 867, 510], "category": "figure_caption", "text": "Fig. 7 Pulse on a regular basis for type: RC0805; maximum permissible peak pulse power as a function of pulse duration for single pulse and repetitive pulse $t_p/t_i = 1000$"}, {"bbox": [138, 563, 851, 847], "category": "figure", "text": ""}, {"bbox": [108, 871, 814, 886], "category": "figure_caption", "text": "Fig. 8 Pulse on a regular basis for type: RC0805; maximum permissible peak pulse voltage as a function of pulse duration"}, {"bbox": [86, 951, 188, 971], "category": "footer", "text": "☑ ☑ ☑"}, {"bbox": [86, 972, 183, 984], "category": "footer", "text": "Sep 03, 2004 V.2"}, {"bbox": [812, 957, 909, 967], "category": "footer", "text": "www.yageo.com"}]
```
